case_title: JOANNA THEIL VS. SUPER STAR MART LLC DBA OCEAN VIEW SUPERMARKET et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JAN-12-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SUPER STAR MART LLC DBA OCEAN VIEW SUPERMARKET

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THEIL, JOANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUPER STAR MART LLC DBA OCEAN VIEW SUPERMARKET CHENG, LINDA $3,392.91 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,532.91, DEFENDANT NOT RESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-23-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 - SERVED JAN-12-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, LINDA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,392.91 FILED BY THEIL, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT SUPER STAR MART LLC DBA OCEAN VIEW SUPERMARKET CHENG, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, LINDA HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-04-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
